configurePresets.name: windows-mingw
configurePresets.description: Everything discovered manually while getting decode-orc to build with MinGW-w64/gcc instead of MSVC. Not an officially supported path — see docs/installation/source/windows-mingw-source.md for the two one-time setup steps this preset assumes (vcpkg bootstrapped with the mingw triplet, and ezpwd-reed-solomon cloned as a sibling directory).
